Decode T → nearest word in vocabulary:
WHY THE CO-OCCURRENCE DEMO WORKS WITHOUT GLOVE
p = a ∧ b = (a₀b₁−a₁b₀, a₀b₂−a₂b₀, a₀b₃−a₃b₀, a₁b₂−a₂b₁, a₁b₃−a₃b₁, a₂b₃−a₃b₂)
p₀₁·p₂₃ − p₀₂·p₁₃ + p₀₃·p₁₂ = 0 (defines the Grassmannian G(2,4) ⊂ P⁵)
⟨p, q⟩ = p · (★q) = 0 ⟺ lines p, q meet (★ = Hodge dual)
